DynamicHeader::_bits

DynamicHeader::_bits Struct Reference

Useful for setting route parameters. More...


Data Fields

unsigned int length:7
 Length of message in words, including the tag word, but not the header word.
unsigned int dest_y:11
 Y coordinate of the destination tile.
unsigned int dest_x:11
 X coordinate of the destination tile.
unsigned int reserved:1
 Reserved.
unsigned int demux:2
 Demux to which the message should be delivered at the destination.

Detailed Description

Useful for setting route parameters.

Field Documentation

unsigned int DynamicHeader::_bits::length

Length of message in words, including the tag word, but not the header word.

unsigned int DynamicHeader::_bits::dest_y

Y coordinate of the destination tile.

unsigned int DynamicHeader::_bits::dest_x

X coordinate of the destination tile.

unsigned int DynamicHeader::_bits::reserved

Reserved.

unsigned int DynamicHeader::_bits::demux

Demux to which the message should be delivered at the destination.
